project.name: Hero: From Hardcore Basements to John Prine's Label

data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Cincinnati basement show ambiance - dim overhead bulb casting amber light on scattered vinyl records, Gorilla Biscuits and Agnostic Front album covers visible, acoustic guitar leaning against a half-stack amp, tattooed hands reaching for a record, Rust Belt working-class texture, beer-stained carpet and show flyers on concrete walls
